summary: Classified the five open inventory PRs independently as requested. No shared canonical is selected for this live PR inventory shard. No close, merge, fix, or low-signal cleanup action is safe or permitted from the hydrated evidence; each PR should remain open for its existing maintainer/author review path.

actions.reason: Keep open for author/maintainer follow-up; the PR is useful but has unresolved review/proof blockers and this job cannot fix or merge it.
Keep open as a useful contributor PR; it is not low-signal or safely closable, and merge/fix actions are blocked by job frontmatter.
Keep open for the existing proof and maintainer review path; this job cannot raise a fix PR and should not close a focused bug fix with unresolved proof.
Keep open as related command-lane work; close/supersede would require a hydrated canonical replacement and technical maintainer judgment that this job does not have.
Keep open for maintainer/author follow-up; existing maintainer signal and actionable review comments block any automated close or merge recommendation.
